title: Claude Code Tool Names
description: Canonical single source of truth for allowed tool names in Claude Code skill and command frontmatter. Referenced by skill-frontmatter.schema.json, command-frontmatter.schema.json, and validate-agent.sh for their allowed-tools items definition. To add a new tool, update this file only.

toolName.description: A valid Claude Code tool name — either a known built-in tool or an MCP tool following the mcp__* naming convention.

oneOf.title: MCP tool
oneOf.description: Dynamically registered MCP tool, prefixed with mcp__ followed by the server name and tool name.

oneOf.title: Scoped Task tool
oneOf.description: Task tool scoped to a specific agent type. Used in agent tools arrays to restrict which sub-agents can be spawned. Format: Task(agent-name).
